title: Portal-Free Recipes
description: Adds crafting table recipes, most of which are for crafting items exclusive to the End and the Nether.
body:
## Information
- **Summary:** Adds crafting table recipes, most of which are for crafting items exclusive to the End and the Nether.
- **Notes:** I will not add or consider new items for this mod in the future; this mod does not add any new items to the game. It is helpful for vanilla-styled Overworld-only challenges and mod packs. This mod does not disable Ender and Nether portals however.    
- **Recommended (Optional) Mods:** [AntiPortals](https://modrinth.com/mod/antiportals), [No More Ruined Portals](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-more-ruined-portals), [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)/[JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)/[REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei).
- **Credits:** Made with MCreator.
## YouTube Video
